description: Polish and wire QuantDocs - integrate @quant/brand, wire real Yjs collaboration backend via WebSocket, add Framer Motion spring animations, loading/empty/error/success states, responsive 360-1440px, dark mode, performance, accessibility.
steps: 1. Add @quant/brand to package.json dependencies and add path mappings to tsconfig.json (add @quant/brand path like quantads has)
2. Update src/app/globals.css to use brand tokens for CSS vars, ensure dark mode matches brand dark theme. Use quantdocs app color (#14B8A6) as --brand-app-color
3. Update src/app/layout.tsx: import brand app config (quantdocs) from @quant/brand, set proper metadata with app icon from brand, theme-color meta tag

4. Update src/hooks/useDocument.ts: wire to real backend (already has /api/docs/[id] route proxying to backend). Add Yjs WebSocket connection for real-time collaboration. Use yjs package (already in deps) with WebSocket provider connecting to backend yjs-server.ts endpoint. Add awareness/presence state
5. Update src/hooks/useDocuments.ts: wire to real backend /api/docs route. Add React Query mutations for create/delete/rename documents. Optimistic updates for doc list

6. Update src/components/DocEditor.tsx: integrate Yjs collaboration with real WebSocket connection to backend yjs-server. Show cursor presence from other users (PresenceBar.tsx). Add spring animations for toolbar appear/disappear

7. Update src/components/DocList.tsx: add spring stagger animations from @quant/brand motion for list items. Add empty state when no docs. Add loading skeletons. Virtualize for large lists (react-window or native approach)
8. Update src/components/DocToolbar.tsx: add spring microinteractions on toolbar buttons, proper 44px tap targets, hover/focus states with brand ring color
9. Update src/components/PresenceBar.tsx: show real collaborator avatars with spring pop-in animations, proper dark mode styling
10. Update src/components/ShareDialog.tsx, CommentsPanel.tsx, VersionHistory.tsx, AISidebar.tsx: add spring dialog/panel animations, loading states, error handling, brand theming
11. Update src/app/page.tsx: use proper LoadingState/ErrorState/EmptyState. Wire New Document button to real mutation
12. Update src/app/doc/[id]/page.tsx: real-time doc editing page with Yjs, loading/error states, responsive layout
13. Ensure responsive 360-1440px, 44px tap targets, dark mode throughout
14. Run pnpm --filter @quant/quantdocs typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/quantdocs lint to verify
acceptance_criteria: pnpm --filter @quant/quantdocs typecheck passes with zero errors
pnpm --filter @quant/quantdocs lint passes with zero errors
@quant/brand is imported and used (motion springs, app config, theme colors)
Yjs WebSocket integration wired to backend yjs-server.ts (no mock data)
All hooks use React Query for CRUD operations
Framer Motion spring animations on doc list, toolbar, dialogs, panels
Dark mode fully functional with brand dark theme colors
All interactive elements have 44px minimum tap targets and proper aria attributes
